text: 2026-07-24 update superseding the earlier note: the baseline-join failure was NOT (only) staleness. Root cause was the test fixture: make_synthetic_results() used dispatch_path "cpu" and NA rhs_width/density, an encoding no real harness run emits, so the full-key join could never match ANY baseline. Fixed in commit 60a58a5 (fixture now mirrors the emitted vocabulary; assertion unchanged). Local tools/baseline.csv also regenerated with benchmark-regression-cli.R --update (fresh schema, 478 rows, no >20% regressions vs prior). test-benchmark-harness.R now 9/9 green with the join actually exercising.
